mapper.update: update Question set image_adder_list=#{adder} where user_id=#{userId} and question_id=#{questionId} and image_adder_list='[]' and is_exist=1
mapper.select: select image_adder_list from Question where user_id=#{userId} and question_id=#{questionId} and is_exist=1
mapper.update: update Question set is_exist=0 where user_id=#{userId} and question_id=#{questionId} and is_exist=1
mapper.select: select question_id ,user_id ,question_title ,question_description ,image_adder_list ,writing_amount ,like_amount ,collect_amount ,is_exist ,create_time from Question where question_id=#{questionId} and is_exist=1
